channel.title: Fahim Final News Feed
channel.description: Curated important news from multiple sources

item.title: CNN Founder Ted Turner Dies at 87

- Outspoken CNN founder Ted Turner dies at age 87

- Russia snubs Ukraine's unilateral ceasefire, firing dozens of drones
- Dozens killed as Ukraine accuses Russia of breaking unilateral ceasefire
- Russia snubs Ukraine’s unilateral ceasefire, firing dozens of drones
- Ukraine reports Russian strike after Kyiv-declared ceasefire begins]]>

item.title: Israeli strike kills colonel in Gaza police force, say Palestinian medics

item.title: China, Iran hold talks to discuss opening of Strait of Hormuz

- China urges immediate Hormuz reopening in Iran talks
- China Meets Iranian Official as U.S. Demands Strait of Hormuz Open

item.title: Iran says ports ready to support shipping in Strait of Hormuz
item.description:
Matched Titles:
- Iran expresses 'full readiness' to provide 'maritime services, technical support' to commercial ships in Hormuz
